title: checkpoint
description: The durable snapshot of loop progress. A fresh session reads exactly this to resume. Keyed by plan_id (+ plan_version). Field names and enum values are locked byte-for-byte per references/state_model.md (checkpoint fields).

plan_version.description: The plan version this checkpoint is valid for.

checkpoint_id.description: Unique id of this checkpoint snapshot.

created.description: When this checkpoint was written (ISO-8601 date-time).

node_states.description: Current status of every node, keyed by node_id. Statuses are from the node status enum.

last_completed.description: Nodes most recently moved to completed.

token.description: Approval token surfaced to the user.

requested.description: When the approval was requested (ISO-8601 date-time).

next_suggested_action.description: Human-readable hint for the next agent; advisory only, never a source of truth over the graph.

open_assumptions.description: Assumptions/answers not yet verified; drives needs_clarification resolution.

event_log_ref.description: Path to the append-only event log (deterministic replay).

iteration.description: Loop iteration counter, checked against termination.max_iterations.

loop_id.description: Child-loop checkpoint addition (OPTIONAL, back-compat). This child loop's id (e.g. L001.02.03). Present only in a child loop's (subloop's) checkpoint; absent from a base loop checkpoint. Locked per references/recursive_loops.md §7.4.

parent_loop_id.description: Child-loop checkpoint addition (OPTIONAL, back-compat). The parent loop's id (e.g. L001.02), or null.

parent_node_id.description: Child-loop checkpoint addition (OPTIONAL, back-compat). The node in the parent plan that owns this child loop, or null.

current_node.description: Child-loop checkpoint addition (OPTIONAL, back-compat). The node in this loop's plan currently in focus for resume, or null.

last_valid_artifacts.description: Child-loop checkpoint addition (OPTIONAL, back-compat). Paths of this loop's artifacts confirmed valid at the last checkpoint (safe to reuse on resume). May be empty ([]).

next_recommended_action.description: Child-loop checkpoint addition (OPTIONAL, back-compat). Advisory hint for the next agent resuming this child loop; distinct from the base next_suggested_action; never a source of truth over the graph.

open_blockers.description: Child-loop checkpoint addition (OPTIONAL, back-compat). Blockers currently open in this child loop, mirroring the base blocked shape scoped to the child's graph. May be empty ([]).

node_id.description: The blocked node in this child loop.

status.description: Node status. The canonical, complete set of 15 node statuses. Terminal: completed, cancelled, deprecated.
